name: Hikaru Usada
description: Usada, or Rabi~en~Rose, is revealed to the viewer to be Dejiko's rival. Her nickname may be a play on a number of things. "Rabi~en~Rose" may be a play on the common French saying "La Vie en Rose" which means "life in rose-pink". The Japanese expression "spend a life in rose-pink" means to spend a life without any worries. "Rabi" which resembles the English word "rabbit." replaced "La vie" to form a pun to mean "Rabbit in life without worries," which suggests her personality. Her original name is

name: Homi Moegi
description: She is a close friend with Ren Aikawa and Yua Nakabeni, she attends a class together with them at Yaegasumi High School. Homi is very carefree and clumsy. She has a brother, Rui Moegi. Homi is a bright and active teenage girl. Throughout the series, it's pointed out that Moegi is wealthy as she goes to school in a car with a driver. She also has a younger brother, Rui Moegi who is in junior high school. Moreover, she's a member of the school's swimming club. Her favorite tights are 110 denier.

name: Kaboku Kotani
description: First-year member of the dance club. Has trouble talking in front of people because of his stutter. It was Wanda who drew him into the dance club.

name: Kate Takayama
description: Maria's big sister. She is 15-years-old and also calls Kodaka "Onii-chan." She loves her little sister a lot but would never admit it. ~!As the story progresses, it is hinted that she has feelings for Kodaka.!~
mediaTitles: Haganai: I Don't Have Many Friends
searchTerms: Haganai: I Don't Have Many Friends

name: Keigo Atobe
description: __Height__: 175 cm __Dominant Hand__: Right __Play Style__: All rounder Atobe Keigo is the main person behind the 200 members of Hyoutei Gakuen Tennis Team. Aside from being the strongest player in the team he is also the student council president, thus making him a very influential and powerful figure in his school.

name: Liza
description: Originally known as Lizaryu in her youth. Liza was a slave belonging to a man named [Urs](https://anilist.co/character/188389/Urs), she became master-less after his death. Being initially low-leveled, weak, and trapped in the labyrinth, she pleaded [Satou](https://anilist.co/character/124921/Ichiro-Suzuki) to take her with him, going as far as to offer herself as his literal shield. She officially became Satou's slave together with [Pochi](https://anilist.co/character/124912/Pochi) and [Tama](ht
mediaTitles: Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody
Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody
Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody
searchTerms: Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody

name: Love Cute
description: __Height:__ 160cm Love Cute is a second-year student at Easton Magic Academy. She is the Fifth Fang of the Magia Lupus.

name: Luluka Moria
description: A mysterious girl who works as a member of the "Phantom Thieves" for some reason, despite being a Pretty Cure. She has a laid-back and unconventional personality.

name: Matsurika Shinouji
description: **Height:** 162 cm Matsurika is Mariya's maid. She is generally silent but is usually quite rude when she chooses to speak. She delivers the vast majority of her lines with almost no facial expressions. The majority of her insults are directed at Kanako and Mariya. She refers to Kanako by such names as "Ms. Pig," "Eiffel Tower" and "Tokyo Tower" due to Kanako's tall stature. When speaking to Mariya, Matsurika often delivers sharp remarks in regards to his cross-dressing tendencies or sexual perv

name: Miku Maekawa
description: **Height:** 152 cm **Hometown:** Osaka Prefecture, Japan Miku is a girl who really loves cats and likes to pretend she is one. She gets extremely annoyed when she is told to stop saying “nya” or being forced to stop having fun. While she comes from Osaka, Miku doesn't really share any of the traits associated with the stereotype. She doesn’t speak the Kansai dialect and doesn’t like tsukkomi and boke routines. She detests fish, despite loving to act like a cat.

name: Mio Odagiri
description: A starter on the basketball team who has some troubles shooting. She's positive, athletic and very tall, compared to the rest of characters.

name: Mirei Minami
description: Mirei Minami is a 7th grader at Paprika Academy. When performing, Mirei has lemon yellow hair that is partly tied up to two buns at the top with blue and yellow ribbons. Normally she has short lemon yellow hair that looks the same as her performance hair minus the buns and ribbons. She has bright blue eyes. She also tends to say "pri" at the end of her sentences. She is smart and very good at puzzles. Because of this, she is captain of the displicinary committee at school.

name: Miwa Yamamura
description: Miwa Yamamura is the only daughter of a liquor seller. She is a 3rd-year middle school student whose brash and blunt personality leads her to shenanigans, often involving Handa-sensei. She is best friends with Tamako Arai.

name: Nagisa Aragaki
description: Nagisa Aragaki is a third year at Kitakomachi High and the captain of Kitakomachi's badminton club. Getting skunked by a middle school student at the Inter-High has caused her to go in a slump, hindering her talent. This was later fixed by Kentarou Tachibana.

name: Nao Tsukinose
description: Nao Tsukinose lives in his own world.

name: Omoi
description: Omoi is a shinobi of Kumogakure, and a member of Team Samui. He is [Killer Bee](https://anilist.co/character/18473)'s student along with the other two members of his team. He is a very careful ninja, and likes to think things through before acting. He is more level-headed than his teammate [Karui](https://anilist.co/character/22874), but has a habit of exaggerating the end result of minor things (like when Karui threw a rock at him and he believed it would cause an avalanche and destroy Konoha).

name: Pochi
description: Originally a nameless slave known simply as "Dog" belonging to a man named [Urs](https://anilist.co/character/188389/Urs), but became master-less after his death. She was given the name "Pochi" by [Satou](https://anilist.co/character/124921/Ichiro-Suzuki) during the events of the labyrinth and became his slave after leaving the labyrinth. ~!Pochi would later take up Liza's family name "Kishreshigarza" after being conferred the Honorary Chevalier title and rank.!~
mediaTitles: Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody
Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody
Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody
searchTerms: Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody

name: Raji Shenazard
description: Raji is the prince of Shirayuki's mother country, Tanburn. Regarded by his people and known even by the neighboring country of Clarines as an idiotic and selfish prince, Raji does as he pleases. Raji orders Shirayuki to become his concubine simply because she has rare red hair. In response to this absolute order, Shirayuki cuts her long hair, leaves it behind, and escapes to the neighboring country. After Zen is poisoned by an apple (sent by Raji) intended for Shirayuki, Raji forces Shirayuki to
mediaTitles: Snow White with the Red Hair
Snow White with the Red Hair Season 2
Snow White with the Red Hair: Nandemonai Takaramono, Kono Page

name: Rin Kujou
description: __Height:__ 167.5 cm Saki's loyal and assisting friends, Rin is skilled in the kendo arts and has been a loyal bodyguard of Saki for years, as her family has always served the Tenjouin in this position. The bespectacled Aya is weak-willed and became associated with Saki after she and Rin protected her from bullies when they were children.

name: Rola Sakuraba
description: Rola is a girl that hates to lose to others, and stands out among them. She is also a fearless person that takes on the role of a big sister with an impertinent edge to it. She is also the type to act before properly thinking about the action. (Source: Aikatsu Stars! Wiki)

name: Rosentine Arzen
description: __Height:__ 165 cm (5'4'') Daughter of the duke of Argent with the ability to see ghosts. In her past life, she was able to see ghosts as well and got bullied severely because of it.
